scripts.test: pnpm run test:fast && pnpm run test:agents
scripts.test:fast: pnpm --workspace-concurrency=1 --filter @legion/core --filter @legion/db --filter @legion/scanner --filter @legion/board run test && pnpm --filter @legion/daemon run test:fast
scripts.test:agents: pnpm --filter @legion/runtime run test:agents && pnpm --filter @legion/daemon run test:agents
